result.reason: This feature enables multiple users to share and manage connections within mRemoteNG, requiring significant architectural changes.
result.approach: Develop a robust user authentication and authorization system, modify connection loading/saving mechanisms to support user-specific or shared configurations, and update the UI for user management and context switching.
